description_public: A polygenic estimate related to high-intensity fatigue tendency variation in the general population.

CC.notes: This genotype is associated with typical AMPD1 enzyme function, so your muscle response and recovery from intense bursts of exercise are likely similar to the general population.

CT.effect_label: Higher fatigue tendency in intense efforts
CT.notes: This genotype has been linked to reduced AMPD1 activity in some studies and may be associated with feeling fatigue sooner during very intense exercise, though results are mixed and training adaptation is key.

TT.effect_label: More pronounced altered muscle metabolism tendency
TT.notes: This genotype can lead to much lower AMPD1 activity and has been associated with different muscle energy use during intense effort. This is informational only and not a diagnosis; many carriers still perform at very high levels.

evidence.title: Placeholder evidence for High-intensity fatigue tendency
evidence.quote: This genotype is associated with typical AMPD1 enzyme function, so your muscle response and recovery from intense bursts of exercise are likely similar to the general population.
